'''''Rigel''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] that carried bartenders of the ''[[Dunari's Rest]]'' when the latter was attacked by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. It made it to the hyperspace intact thanks to assistance from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
